239597.explanation: Companies that want to start sustainability initiatives should also be given a chance.

239598.explanation: Do not allocate good agricultural land to solar fields.

239599.explanation: Improving accessibility is always to be welcomed for people with disabilities.

239600.explanation: It's good to accommodate parents, possibly by applying a discount.

239601.explanation: Children should be raised by their parents as much as possible. If this is not always possible, the identity of the parents must be taken into account.

239602.explanation: If the sports club is struggling, first look at why things are not going well.

239603.explanation: Safety is one of the most important matters in our society.

239604.explanation: It is good to hear what concerns people, including regarding safety.

239605.explanation: The police must check everyone, including fatbikers.

239607.explanation: Do not expand social housing without good reason.

239608.explanation: Allow in locations where this does not cause inconvenience.

239609.explanation: Where legal construction takes place, there should not be too many restrictions.

239610.explanation: We are in favor of infill development plans. If necessary, also outside the village boundaries.

239612.explanation: The municipality must sufficiently support people who really need help. We support a generous minimum income policy.

239613.explanation: It is good to provide a counter-performance. Being active is beneficial for everyone.

239614.explanation: People should be sufficiently supported to be active. It leads to a meaningful life.

239615.explanation: This must be assessed on a case-by-case basis. If a lot of help is needed, a temporary job application stop could be possible.

239616.explanation: We do not support a fixed basic income.

239618.explanation: The municipality should look at the type of housing. If small housing units can be built without parking spaces and the resident has no need for one, it could be allowed.

239619.explanation: It is important to support small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs).

239620.explanation: It is good to promote the mobility of residents. This can also be done in cooperation with and through sponsorships from businesses.

239624.explanation: It must be checked whether there are sufficient funds to finance this. Otherwise, realize it at another location.

239625.explanation: We are not in favor of large shelter locations.

239626.explanation: There must also be space for motorists here. Consider also people who cannot do without a car.

239627.explanation: We have no objection if, for example, parts are closed to noisy vehicles on Sundays and Christian holidays.

239628.explanation: It is good to support couples with children who have relationship problems. Especially to prevent the child becoming the one who suffers. Much help can limit damage to the children.

239629.explanation: People with too low an income whose health is at risk should always have somewhere to turn to.

239630.explanation: We support space for Farmer and Citizen. We do not go along with the nitrogen hysteria.

239631.explanation: No expansion in advance. This can always be considered when there are applications.

239633.explanation: If there is a need for it, this can always be urged in consultation.

239634.explanation: It is good if money is spent on this. Having enough designated areas for dogs to run freely is very important and beneficial to the living environment.

239635.explanation: If there is a lot of parking nuisance, this is a good way to manage it properly.

239637.explanation: It is important for people to be able to reach the shops. There are always people with mobility problems who rely on the car.

239638.explanation: Wind turbines can contribute to the energy supply. Each application must be reviewed individually. We are not in favor of large wind farm parks.

239639.explanation: There must remain sufficient parking facilities. When developing construction plans, enough nature must be planned.

239640.explanation: It is wise to build for everyone. This way newcomers can also buy a house.

239641.explanation: It is wise to work with the best. You can then make price agreements with them. A maze of contacts only leads to less efficiency.

239642.explanation: For peace on Sundays and holidays, it is not at all wrong to close the dike during certain hours.

statements.title: The dike between Heteren and Driel should remain open to cars and motorcycles on weekends.
The municipality should remove parking spaces in residential neighbourhoods to create more green space.
Residents who want to generate sustainable energy together should receive financial support from the municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Energy based on resources that are effectively infinite, such as sunlight and wind.

titleParts.text: op willen wekken, moeten financiële steun krijgen van de gemeente.

statements.title: Elst should get an asylum seekers centre (AZC) for 300 asylum seekers.

titleParts.glossary: People who have applied for asylum and are still waiting for a decision.
People who have applied for asylum and are still waiting for a decision.

statements.moreInfo: Under the Distribution Act (Spreidingswet) Overbetuwe must accommodate 297 asylum seekers. The law requires all municipalities to take in asylum seekers so that reception is spread across the country. At the moment Overbetuwe is not hosting asylum seekers in an asylum reception center.

statements.title: The municipality must oppose the establishment of new distribution centers.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de vestiging van nieuwe

titleParts.glossary: Large warehouse where goods are received, distributed and transported to other locations.

statements.title: There should be subsidized jobs for the long-term unemployed in our municipality.

titleParts.glossary: Money the government gives to citizens, businesses, and organizations to support them.
People who have been without paid work for a long time (longer than a year).

statements.title: Housing should also be built on business parks.
The municipality should urge the police to check fatbikes more often for antisocial behaviour.
The municipality should contribute to dental care for low-income people.
The property tax (onroerendezaakbelasting, OZB) should be reduced.

titleParts.glossary: Tax you pay as the owner of a building or piece of land, or as the user of a commercial property.

statements.title: The municipality should stop the expansion of farms with large numbers of animals.
The municipality must ask the police to hold a weekly meeting with the community police officer in each village.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet de politie vragen om in elk dorp wekelijks een

titleParts.glossary: A fixed time when residents can ask questions or drop in.

statements.title: In new construction projects at least 20 percent should consist of owner-occupied homes priced under €250,000.
The municipality should block plans for new wind turbines.

titleParts.text: De gemeente moet plannen voor nieuwe

titleParts.glossary: These are modern wind turbines that convert wind power into electricity and can be up to 150 meters high.

statements.title: More mobile home pitches should be provided in the municipality of Overbetuwe.
statements.moreInfo: There are currently 9 caravan/mobile-home pitches in Overbetuwe: 4 in Heteren, 3 in Zetten and 2 in Herveld. This year or next year 6 more will be added: 4 in Elst and 2 in Randwijk. There are now 40 households on the waiting list.

statements.title: A blue zone should be introduced in the shopping centres of Driel and Heteren where you may park your car for a maximum of two hours.
The municipality should spend dog tax revenue entirely on dog facilities, such as dog exercise areas.

titleParts.glossary: Tax paid to the municipality for owning one or more dogs.
Buildings or services needed for daily life, such as roads, sports facilities or healthcare.

statements.title: People receiving social assistance who care for a family member or acquaintance as informal caregivers should still be required to keep applying for jobs.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.

titleParts.text: die een familielid of bekende verzorgen als

titleParts.glossary: Someone who provides unpaid and often long-term care for sick family members or friends.

statements.title: The municipality should cover the cost of couples therapy for couples with children.

titleParts.glossary: When people try to improve their romantic relationship together with a counselor.

statements.title: Children must be able to access education, childcare and after-school activities on one site from birth through primary school.
The municipality should no longer give status holders priority for social housing.

titleParts.glossary: Refugees who have been granted a residence permit and are therefore allowed to stay in the Netherlands.

titleParts.text: geen voorrang meer geven op een

titleParts.glossary: A rental home with a low rent (in 2026 at most €932.93 per month) for people with a low income.

statements.title: Only companies that operate sustainably should be allowed to establish themselves in our municipality from now on.

titleParts.glossary: Something you can (re)use for a long time.

titleParts.text: werken mogen zich voortaan in onze gemeente

titleParts.glossary: To build, to place somewhere (a building, organization or household).

statements.title: The municipality should prevent new construction outside existing village boundaries.
The municipality must work with fewer different care providers for assistance and support.
The municipality of Overbetuwe should employ more municipal enforcement officers (BOAs) who deal with safety.

titleParts.text: In de gemeente Overbetuwe moeten meer gemeentelijke

titleParts.glossary: People who, for the municipality, check whether citizens and businesses comply with the rules.

titleParts.text: (boa’s) komen die zich met veiligheid bezighouden.

statements.title: In Elst, residential apartment blocks of six storeys or higher may be built.
The municipality should convince the national government that a station should be reinstated on Stationsstraat in Valburg.
People receiving social assistance should, in return, do socially useful work.

titleParts.glossary: Money from the municipality for people who have no income or personal funds.
For example cleaning the streets or keeping company and supporting elderly residents.

statements.title: If sports clubs are struggling, the municipality should contribute financially.

titleParts.text: Als sportverenigingen het moeilijk hebben, moet de gemeente

titleParts.glossary: Financially contributing or helping means giving money to something or someone.

statements.title: Dorpsstraat in Elst should be turned into a bicycle street.

titleParts.text: De Dorpsstraat in Elst moet een

titleParts.glossary: A street where cars must drive slowly and carefully.

shootoutStatements.title: The municipality should spend more money on integrating newcomers into society.
The municipality must invest in a promotional campaign to present Overbetuwe as an attractive location for businesses.
Employers in agriculture and horticulture must provide housing for seasonal workers themselves.
The municipality should encourage agricultural land to be converted into nature reserves.
The municipality must invest in a new library in Elst.
The municipality must pay for sports club memberships for children whose parents or guardians have little money.
Parking at shopping centers must remain free.
At least 30% of newly built homes in Overbetuwe must be social rental housing. In Overbetuwe, 22% of homes are currently social rental housing.
The municipality of Overbetuwe must run a pilot project with a basic income.
The municipality should allow the construction of homes without parking spaces.
The municipality should invest in tailored transport between the local centers (for example a dial‑a‑ride bus).
The municipality should financially help business owners to make their buildings accessible to people with disabilities.
The Dorpstraat in Elst must remain fully accessible to cars.
The municipality should ban solar panels on agricultural land.
The municipality must support more people in poverty by raising the income eligibility threshold.
Cars and motorcycles must always be allowed to drive over the dikes in the municipality.
